description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black pole with a classic Victorian-inspired design. The base is rounded and slightly bulbous, tapering upward to a decorative collar before extending into a straight shaft. At the top, the lamp head is shaped like an inverted trapezoid with a pointed finial, and the light enclosure is framed by dark metal, giving it a traditional lantern appearance. The lamp head is enclosed with a frosted or opaque glass panel, diffusing the light for a soft glow. The overall aesthetic is elegant and timeless, suitable for urban streets, parks, or historic neighborhoods. There are no visible attachments, signage, or additional fixtures on the post.
description: A tall, black Victorian-style lamppost with a decorative base and a single lantern-shaped lamp head featuring frosted glass panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, classic lantern head and the ornate base.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the straight shaft and lantern head.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front with the same lantern and base details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again similar to the front, emphasizing the uniform design.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic Victorian lantern with an inverted trapezoidal shape and pointed finial
